subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto God! In certain stations, the mention of detachment is sweeter than that of acquisition; nay, in one station man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله در بعضی از مقامات ذکر ترک احلی از اخذ است بلکه در یکمقام انسان از
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
